TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Cadillac Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1964, ryax sa tay 22 nqu tay 6, Cadillac Anderson, squliq na p'unro. Cadillac Anderson sangka' mzyu mari pspung maki Houston hopa pqwasan biru. 1984 kawas hiya sangka' mzyu mari pspung maki Seattle. kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨa*illaʦ~ʨ an*ers~ɕon s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ʦ~ʨa*illaʦ~ʨ an*ers~ɕon, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨa*illaʦ~ʨ an*ers~ɕon s~ɕaŋkaʔ mzju mari ps~ɕpuŋ maki ħous~ɕton ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. **** kawas~ɕ ħija s~ɕaŋkaʔ mzju mari ps~ɕpuŋ maki s~ɕeattle. kinβlajqan pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan s~ɕa qnxan nijaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Cadillac Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1964, ryax sa tay 22 nqu tay 6, Cadillac Anderson, squliq na p'unro. Cadillac Anderson sangka' mzyu mari pspung maki Houston hopa pqwasan biru. 1984 kawas hiya sangka' mzyu mari pspung maki Seattle. kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨa*illaʦ~ʨ an*ers~ɕon s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ʦ~ʨa*illaʦ~ʨ an*ers~ɕon, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨa*illaʦ~ʨ an*ers~ɕon s~ɕaŋkaʔ mzju mari ps~ɕpuŋ maki ħous~ɕton ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. **** kawas~ɕ ħija s~ɕaŋkaʔ mzju mari ps~ɕpuŋ maki s~ɕeattle. kinβlajqan pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan s~ɕa qnxan nijaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
